Address: Sandweg 12, 60316 Frankfurt
Services: German integration courses (BAMF-approved), corporate language training
Languages offered: German, English, Polish, Italian, Spanish, Chinese, Arabic, Japanese
Formats: Individual, partner, or group training

ania.name: Anna Mazurek
ania.bio_text: [VERIFY ON INSTAGRAM] Display name: "Anna Mazurek | NIEMIECKI | kursy online". Describes herself as "Nauczycielka niemieckiego z pasją" (German teacher with passion). Owner of German language school. Teaches everyday German from basics and German for work/real-life situations. Mentions her own textbooks ("autorskie podręczniki") and 3,000+ students.
